query:
SELECT rt.id, rt.code, rt.name, rc.name as category
FROM requestTypes rt
JOIN requestCategories rc ON rt.categoryId = rc.id
WHERE rt.code = 'ADMIN_VISIT' OR rt.name LIKE '%Admin%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user BsRQq1X2Mh9kZmK.6749932367bb --database WqXabcMRQ5aEFJ4QyeefuN --execute SELECT rt.id, rt.code, rt.name, rc.name as category
FROM requestTypes rt
JOIN requestCategories rc ON rt.categoryId = rc.id
WHERE rt.code = 'ADMIN_VISIT' OR rt.name LIKE '%Admin%';
